rows.theorem_family: Schoenberg Polya-frequency functions and variation-diminishing kernels

No use of already-known Jensen hyperbolicity

rows.fatal_gap: The required PF kernel/operator representation is missing.

rows.proof_boundary: Promising theorem family only if a new kernel/operator representation is proved.

rows.theorem_family: Karlin total-positivity composition / Cauchy-Binet determinant propagation
rows.fit_to_jwpf06: Could close the bridge if every Jensen-window Toeplitz minor were represented as an integral/sum of products of nonnegative determinants.
required_hypotheses: A positive kernel, planar network, production matrix, or determinant integral whose Cauchy-Binet expansion equals each Jensen-window Toeplitz minor
Uniform control of all d,n and all minor shapes
A proof that the construction uses the actual zeta heat-flow coefficients
current_evidence: The coefficient-PF route already names positive determinant-integral formulas as an open target.
The Jensen-window obligation ledger isolates the binomial-weighted minors requiring such a formula.
rows.fatal_gap: No positive determinant formula or network for the Jensen-window Toeplitz minors is known.
rows.next_action: Attempt symbolic Cauchy-Binet rewrites of low-degree Jensen-window Toeplitz minors and look for a uniform positive-kernel pattern.
rows.proof_boundary: Candidate structural route only; no positive kernel/integral is currently proved.

rows.theorem_family: Polya-Schur multiplier sequences, Schur-Szego composition, and real-root preservers
rows.fit_to_jwpf06: Potentially relevant to the binomial-weight factor, since the bridge needs a stability-preserving way to pass between unweighted coefficient windows and binomially weighted Jensen windows.
required_hypotheses: A verified real-root preserving operator exactly matching the binomial weighting at fixed degree
All unweighted input windows satisfying the relevant real-root/PF hypothesis
Uniform compatibility as d and n vary
current_evidence: The degree-2 signed-Hankel contact is exact.
No all-degree unweighted-window real-root theorem is proved.
rows.fatal_gap: Preserver theory cannot help until the input family to be preserved is itself proved to satisfy the required zero/PF condition.
rows.next_action: Formalize the finite-degree binomial-weight operator and test whether it reduces the bridge to a strictly weaker all-window real-root obligation.
rows.proof_boundary: Preserver machinery may handle binomial weights but does not by itself prove the required input windows.

rows.fatal_gap: No transfer theorem from the signed/indefinite Hankel pattern to Jensen-window Toeplitz TN is identified.
rows.next_action: Search specifically for sign-regular-to-TN transfer theorems with binomial/Toeplitz minors, and reject any version contradicted by the degree-3 countermodel.
